text: These angled, glassed-in halls and illuminated installations evoke in me a sense of both anticipation and alienation. Here, technology and research are displayed artfully, yet their sterile presentation makes me feel somewhat removed from the vibrant life they are meant to represent. I sense progress and possibility but am also acutely aware of my own curiosity—wondering how I might fit into this landscape of innovation and experimentation. The clean lines and glowing panels make the environment seem both promising and profoundly impersonal.
